overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a multi-level neon-lit urban plaza at night. The camera moves along elevated walkways, descends to a central courtyard with an outdoor bar, and ascends to an opposite walkway while passing various NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway between corporate towers

events.description: character in bright green pants enters view from the left
character in green pants begins dancing while others watch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway, observing NPCs socializing and dancing

notable_agents.action: character in bright green pants performing an energetic dance routine
character in red and gold outfit standing with a drink, conversing with companion

entered.detail: transparent glass railing with metal posts lining the walkway edge
large magenta neon sign on distant building facade
tall palm trees visible between buildings against night sky
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and teal accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated walkway between futuristic corporate towers. Two characters stand near the railing conversing, while a third character in bright green pants performs a dance routine. Neon pink and teal lights illuminate the scene as the camera moves forward along the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of elevated walkway overlooking central courtyard

events.description: camera approaches railing and looks down into the lower courtyard

agents.ego_description: slowing to look over the railing at the courtyard below

entered.detail: tall cylindrical light fixtures emitting warm yellow light
open plaza area with seating and bar visible two stories below
modern pavilion with illuminated roof and counter
water feature reflecting the surrounding neon lights

segments.scene_description: Moving past the social group, the camera proceeds to the end of the walkway. The view opens to reveal a lower courtyard with an outdoor bar and reflective pool. Vertical neon light poles line the path as the camera looks down over the glass railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: central courtyard with outdoor bar and lounge seating

events.description: descends from upper walkway to courtyard level
approaches the outdoor bar pavilion with purple neon roof

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower courtyard, navigating around seating areas toward the bar

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: dark tiled flooring with geometric patterns
futuristic curved benches with integrated lighting
sleek bar structure with stools and illuminated countertop
glowing purple neon strip along the roof edge of the bar
large potted plants flanking the bar entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to the courtyard level and moves through the open plaza. Modern sculptural seating with green accent lighting dots the area. The camera approaches an outdoor bar with a distinctive purple neon roof, where a bartender works behind the counter surrounded by tropical plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: opposite elevated walkway with social gathering

events.description: ascends from courtyard to the opposite upper walkway
approaches a group of four characters standing near the railing

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs to the opposite walkway and moving toward a social group

notable_agents.action: group of four characters socializing and looking out over the courtyard

entered.detail: glass and metal railing with integrated LED strip lighting along the base
transparent elevator column with visible lift mechanism
connecting walkway with cyan neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bar behind, the camera ascends to the opposite walkway. The perspective shifts to show the courtyard from the other side. The camera approaches a group of four characters gathered near the railing, with a glass elevator shaft visible in the background and neon lights reflecting off the glass surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated corporate walkway down into a neon-lit courtyard before ascending to a mirrored vantage point. It begins on a high concrete path between futuristic towers, gliding past conversing characters and a dancer under vibrant pink and teal lights. As the camera reaches the end of the walkway, the perspective shifts downward over a glass railing to reveal a lower plaza featuring a reflective pool and vertical neon poles. The scene then descends into the courtyard, moving past sculptural green seating toward an outdoor bar with a purple neon roof and tropical plants. Finally, the camera ascends to the opposite elevated walkway, turning toward a group of characters with a glass elevator shaft reflecting the surrounding city lights in the background.
